_meta.description: Decision-support policy for everyday document recommendations with evidence-aware framing.
changeLog: Added machine-actionable rules for everyday domain

rules.trigger: Everyday query asks a value comparison but no period is provided
rules.check: context.domain == 'everyday' AND context.queryNeedsTimeScope == true AND context.periodRef == null

rules.trigger: Compare intent without two explicit documents
User mentions 'bill' with multiple possible categories
rules.check: context.domain == 'everyday' AND context.docTypeHint IN ['bill','receipt'] AND context.docTypeRefined == null

rules.trigger: Everyday recommendation depends on an inferred conversion without numbers
Everyday query returns mixed currency/unit not requested
rules.check: context.domain == 'everyday' AND context.sourceCurrency != context.queryCurrency AND context.currencyConversionRequested == false

rules.trigger: Bill or receipt has missing page/section required for safe summary

optionsFramework.name: document_status_path
optionsFramework.uncertaintyPrompt: State known facts, unknowns, and confidence range.
optionsFramework.whatChangesMyMindPrompt: List one concrete signal that would materially alter recommendation.
optionsFramework.optionScaffold: Option A: Base on current doc only. Option B: Cross-doc average.

optionsFramework.name: period_comparison_path
optionsFramework.uncertaintyPrompt: Declare fatos conhecidos, lacunas e faixa de confianca.
optionsFramework.whatChangesMyMindPrompt: Liste sinais concretos que fariam mudar a recomendacao.
optionsFramework.optionScaffold: Opcao A: Analisar apenas o periodo atual. Opcao B: analisar periodo anterior para tendencia.

templates.text: Use machine-actionable policy fallback when a specific template is missing in decision_support.everyday.
